CustomField.description: System only field. Used in scheduled flow to update the Aktivt medlemskap field.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND(Person__r.LatestMembership__c = Id, Status__c <> "Aktiv" ),true, IF( AND(Person__r.LatestMembership__c <> Id, OR(Status__c = "Aktiv",Status__c = "Kommande" ) ), true, false))
CustomField.label: UpdateNeeded
